item.title: DOKAPON 3-2-1: Super Collection! coming to PC on June 29
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Sugoroku RPG bundle previously released for Switch.

Sting will release sugoroku RPG bundle DOKAPON 3-2-1: Super Collection! for PC via Steam on June 29, the developer announced. It will only support Japanese as a language option.

DOKAPON 3-2-1: Super Collection! first launched for Switch on January 29 in Japan.

Here is an overview o the collection, via its Steam page:

About

Legend, friendship, and fire—three DOKAPON adventures unite in one collection.

It may look like an RPG or a board game…

But underneath lies a anything-goes, free-for-all sugoroku RPG experience!!

Includes three classic titles—DOKAPON Kingdom IV, DOKAPON! 3-2-1, and DOKAPON Gaiden: Flame no Audition—all in one package!

Included Titles

  • DOKAPON Kingdom IV: The Legendary Heroes – The origin of the series. Experience the true essence of a sugoroku RPG with up to 4 players. Defeat monsters and compete to build the greatest wealth.
  • DOKAPON! 3-2-1: Arashi o Yobu Yuujou (Friendship That Stirs the Storm) – Featuring character designs by Ami Shibata, along with new modes such as Story Mode and Battle Royale. Friendship and betrayal collide in intense, unpredictable battles!
  • DOKAPON Gaiden: Flame no Audition – A fast-paced spin-off with compact maps and one-way progression. Simple yet highly strategic gameplay makes every move count.

Play Your Way

Enjoy DOKAPON in your own style:

  • Take your time and play solo as an RPG.
  • Compete with others to become the wealthiest player.

The signature DOKAPON experience delivers tension-filled moments of sabotage and comeback, intense player interactions, and the thrill of stealing victory right from your rivals.

A must-have collection for all DOKAPON fans—three legendary titles of chaos, friendship, and fiery competition.

Friendship… eventually turns into betrayal.

…but that’s what DOKAPON is all about.

New Features

Enhanced with new features for an even better experience!!

  • Save and Load Anywhere – Save and load at any point during gameplay.
  • Rewind Function – Go back to your previous move and try again.
  • Up to 3x Game Speed – Freely adjust game speed from 0.5x to 3x at any time.
  • Original Manuals Included – View manuals that closely recreate the original releases.
  • Bonus Artwork in DOKAPON! 3-2-1 Manual – Includes rare character illustrations by Ami Shibata
  • Manual Mode – View the manual alongside the game while playing

Watch a new trailer below.

PC Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/dokapon-3-2-1-super-collection-coming-to-pc-on-june-29
